'''ranumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oathsex|oathsex]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oathsex|oathsex]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ranumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rænimith|rænimith]] || [[word:rænimij|rænimij]] || [[word:rænimish|rænimish]] || [[word:rænimi|rænimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranunumuth|ranunumuth]] || [[word:ranunumuj|ranunumuj]] || [[word:ranunumush|ranunumush]] || [[word:ranunumu|ranunumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranumuth|ranumuth]] || [[word:ranumuj|ranumuj]] || [[word:ranumush|ranumush]] || [[word:ranumu|ranumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranufmuth|ranufmuth]] || [[word:ranufmuj|ranufmuj]] || [[word:ranufmush|ranufmush]] || [[word:ranufmuf|ranufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ranumuthu|ranumuthu]] || [[word:ranumuju|ranumuju]] || [[word:ranumushu|ranumushu]] || [[word:ranumuku|ranumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ranumuth|ranumuth]] || [[word:ranumuj|ranumuj]] || [[word:ranumush|ranumush]] || [[word:ranumu|ranumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ranumuthul|ranumuthul]] || [[word:ranumujul|ranumujul]] || [[word:ranumushul|ranumushul]] || [[word:ranumukul|ranumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ranumuthuthu|ranumuthuthu]] || [[word:ranumujuju|ranumujuju]] || [[word:ranumushushu|ranumushushu]] || [[word:ranumuku|ranumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ranumuthun|ranumuthun]] || [[word:ranumujun|ranumujun]] || [[word:ranumushun|ranumushun]] || [[word:ranumukun|ranumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ranumuthuoro|ranumuthuoro]] || [[word:ranumujuoro|ranumujuoro]] || [[word:ranumushuoro|ranumushuoro]] || [[word:ranumukuoro|ranumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
